title: Unsupported: The structure name is the same as the variable name

features.name: packed union member with name identical to its typedef type
features.description: Code should include a packed union where at least one member's identifier is exactly the same as the typedef name used as its type (e.g., `t1 t1;`), causing the parser to see the member name as a TYPE-IDENTIFIER token

features.name: nested dot access through union member whose name equals its type
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical member access expression where an intermediate field name is the same as its typedef type name, such as `bus.t2.a` where `t2` is both the type and the member name of a packed union

features.name: packed union with heterogeneous packed struct members
features.description: Code should include a packed union that aggregates two or more distinct packed struct typedefs as its members, allowing bit-level reinterpretation through different struct views
